{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "59f2882e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Eigenmode: the TESLA elliptical cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "This example runs the eigenmode solver on the canonical TESLA elliptical cell — the fundamental accelerating mode and its figures of merit, then the monopole and dipole passbands and the mode-reconstructed impedance. Everything is driven through the `cav.eigenmode` interface on a single cavity (no `Study` needed).\n",
    "\n",
    "See the [eigenmode theory](../../theory/eigenmode) and [user guide](../../eigenmode)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "a0881a9a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:32:53.670550Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:32:53.670376Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.222373Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.221303Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:30.360665300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:28.885454Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "17ec5b8d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. The cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "A single TESLA mid-cell, parameters `[A, B, a, b, Ri, L, Req]` in mm, with beam pipes at both ends."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "47b8f8de",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.224852Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.224486Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.461243Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.460415Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:30.662359300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:30.378695300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "midcell = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.652, 103.3536]  # <- A, B, a, b, Ri, L, Req\n",
    "endcell_l = [40.34, 40.34, 10, 13.5, 39, 55.7251, 103.3536]\n",
    "endcell_r = [42, 42, 9, 12.8, 39, 56.8407, 103.3536]\n",
    "cav = EllipticalCavity(9, midcell, endcell_l, endcell_r, beampipe='both', name='tesla')\n",
    "cav.set_workspace(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'tesla'))\n",
    "\n",
    "cav.plot('geometry')      # matplotlib half cross-section (r >= 0)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a1242db4",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. The fundamental monopole mode\n",
    "\n",
    "`cav.eigenmode.run(...)` solves the monopole passband; `cav.eigenmode.qois` returns the figures of merit of the accelerating (pi) mode."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "c8669d1b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.463794Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:32:56.463567Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.863959Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.863008Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:51.118933Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:30.668701Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "cav.eigenmode.run({'polarisation': 'monopole',\n",
    "                   'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                   'mesh_config': {'h': 6, 'p': 3}})\n",
    "cav.eigenmode.qois"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'m': 0,\n",
       " 'polarisation': 'monopole',\n",
       " 'Normalization Length [mm]': 115.304,\n",
       " 'N Cells': 9,\n",
       " 'freq [MHz]': 1300.0062842171467,\n",
       " 'Q []': 29236.789419263256,\n",
       " 'Vacc [MV]': 1.5169262200444274e-05,\n",
       " 'Eacc [MV/m]': 1.4617650539678945e-05,\n",
       " 'Epk [MV/m]': 2.9358256981550473e-05,\n",
       " 'Hpk [A/m]': 0.04872094407769789,\n",
       " 'Bpk [mT]': 6.122454399618194e-05,\n",
       " 'kcc [%]': 1.8299452510197212,\n",
       " 'ff [%]': 98.36632068217993,\n",
       " 'Rsh [MOhm]': 29.609745417306776,\n",
       " 'R/Q [Ohm]': 1012.7563937577152,\n",
       " 'Epk/Eacc []': 2.0084114681671195,\n",
       " 'Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]': 4.188398390698334,\n",
       " 'G [Ohm]': 271.3058410996727,\n",
       " 'GR/Q [Ohm^2]': 274766.72523750825,\n",
       " 'No of Mesh Elements': 6167,\n",
       " 'mode_of_interest': '9',\n",
       " 'No of DOFs': 87608}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2ec2b7ce",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "The accelerating field on the axis — a single peak at the cell centre, as it should be for the fundamental:"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "2b586ed5",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.866066Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.865853Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.968657Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.967654Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:51.302095600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:51.121396600Z"
    }
   },
   "source": "cav.plot_axis_field()",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: >"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f57cd047",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. Higher-order modes\n",
    "\n",
    "The same 2D meridian mesh solves any azimuthal order. Here the monopole and dipole passbands together; `qois_df` tabulates every mode of every polarisation. It has many columns, so we show a readable subset:"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "2b9d3c05",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.970806Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:33:00.970551Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.075727Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.074865Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.000630900Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:22:51.329001700Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "cav.eigenmode.run({'polarisation': ['monopole', 'dipole', 'quadrupole'],\n",
    "                   'n_modes': 20,\n",
    "                   'boundary_conditions': 'mm',\n",
    "                   'mesh_config': {'h': 6, 'p': 3}})\n",
    "\n",
    "df = cav.eigenmode.qois_df\n",
    "cols = ['polarisation', 'mode', 'freq [MHz]', 'R/Q [Ohm]', 'G [Ohm]',\n",
    "        'Epk/Eacc []', 'Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]']\n",
    "df[[c for c in cols if c in df.columns]].round(3).head"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<bound method NDFrame.head of    polarisation  mode  freq [MHz]  R/Q [Ohm]  G [Ohm]  Epk/Eacc []  \\\n",
       "0      monopole     0    1276.433      0.001  268.617     2316.889   \n",
       "1      monopole     1    1278.503      0.000  268.886     4795.157   \n",
       "2      monopole     2    1281.690      0.009  269.299      819.870   \n",
       "3      monopole     3    1285.624      0.001  269.804     3039.467   \n",
       "4      monopole     4    1289.841      0.023  270.346      545.599   \n",
       "..          ...   ...         ...        ...      ...          ...   \n",
       "61   quadrupole    17    2490.381      5.949  478.421       26.715   \n",
       "62   quadrupole    18    3213.392      0.073  350.478      354.111   \n",
       "63   quadrupole    19    3225.452      7.745  359.557       54.083   \n",
       "64   quadrupole    20    3229.549      1.290  360.504      110.743   \n",
       "65   quadrupole    21    3252.133     19.094  380.749       28.972   \n",
       "\n",
       "    Bpk/Eacc [mT/MV/m]  \n",
       "0             5696.033  \n",
       "1            11699.431  \n",
       "2             1951.914  \n",
       "3             7016.717  \n",
       "4             1237.888  \n",
       "..                 ...  \n",
       "61              88.218  \n",
       "62            1852.212  \n",
       "63             284.257  \n",
       "64             578.649  \n",
       "65             145.357  \n",
       "\n",
       "[66 rows x 7 columns]>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "9dfaf16c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "The mode spectrum:"
   ]
  },
  {

   "id": "d0256dc5",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.077900Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.077666Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.199602Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.198861Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.206103600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.025215300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": "cav.eigenmode.plot_spectrum()",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""

     "metadata": {},

    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: title={'center': 'Eigenmode spectrum — tesla'}, xlabel='Mode index', ylabel='Frequency [MHz]'>"

     "execution_count": 6,

   ],
   "execution_count": 6

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "974122ec",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. Impedance reconstructed from the modes\n",
    "\n",
    "Each mode is treated as a resonator, so the eigenmode results reconstruct the beam-coupling impedance directly (see the theory page). This is cheap and has no wake-length truncation, so it complements a wakefield solve."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "59dda67d",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.201654Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.201387Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.680458Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-17T20:33:14.679587Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.494592500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.211782400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "cav.eigenmode.plot_impedance('longitudinal')"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='f [MHz]', ylabel='$|Z_\\\\parallel|$ [k$\\\\Omega$]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 7,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 7
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "6d43b3a7",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.807902Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-17T22:24:34.496593800Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "cav.eigenmode.plot_impedance('transverse')"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ],

    {

  {

   "source": [

   ]
  }
